chapter_title.en: Chapter on Livelihoods, Earnings, Profits, and Professions

text: 3576 - وَ رَوَى حَمَّادٌ اَللَّحَّامُ عَنْ أَبِي عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ قَالَ : "لاَ تَكْسَلُوا فِي طَلَبِ مَعَايِشِكُمْ فَإِنَّ آبَاءَنَا كَانُوا يَرْكُضُونَ فِيهَا وَ يَطْلُبُونَهَا".

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.3576 - Hammad al-Lahham narrated from Abu Abdullah (as), who said:
"Do not be lazy in seeking your livelihood, for our fathers used to strive for it and pursue it."
